title: Feature Comparison
description: Extracted structure for 'us vs them' comparison pages (e.g., 7shifts.com/compare/7shifts-vs-wheniwork/, joinhomebase.com/compare/*). Always frames the comparison FROM the page publisher's point of view, then normalizes to Fourth's perspective.

competitor_name.description: Name of the competitor (the 'them' side of the comparison).

our_product.description: Fixed as 'Fourth' because these schemas support Fourth's competitive intelligence.

page_publisher.description: Who published the comparison page (e.g., '7shifts', 'Homebase'). Useful to flag bias — self-published vs third-party.

competitor_has.description: Does the competitor have this feature per the page?

fourth_has.description: Does Fourth have this feature? Fill in from Fourth's internal KB if not addressed on the source page.

notes.description: Any qualifying detail (e.g., 'competitor charges extra for this', 'Fourth only available in enterprise tier').

overall_positioning_claim.description: The headline positioning claim the page makes (e.g., 'Purpose-built for restaurants, unlike generic scheduling tools').
